programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: Buck the Dog has romantic designs on every bitch in the neighborhood, but dashes Peg & Al's hopes of becoming wealthy breeders when he refuses to court a pampered pedigree.

programs.desc: Al builds a private clubhouse to escape, but discovers there are many miserable fathers-to-be who wish to join him.
